Highly recommend McMartin Roofing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chuck Cordeiro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_qXFCdpND3RXNzqTKUMkQSo16b_Wjci6y8nYv5YOfQxMXctc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had called another roofing company for a small job to run our bathroom exhaust fan thru the roof… they kept giving us the run around and finding a reason they couldn’t come by.

After a week of no shows, my wife found Darren and told him about our situation and that we needed to get this done right away as we had someone coming to work on our attic on the Monday,… he simply replied, I can squeeze you in and do it right now that same Saturday.

He was there in under an hour, job was done in 20min (unlike the week of frustration we faced with the other roofing company)… even gave us enough tubing to run the the bathroom exhaust thru.

Price was reasonable, service was incredible!

You can see how this family owned company has successfully lasted over 60 years… service and quality work… that is the secret to a successful company!

100% recommend Darren for your roofing project!!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Woodrow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUEpKgPxXVXlGx3dCY0UtCvcDcF1PxYfyePJj1ZKKJbtcVJrhO9=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"McMartin Roofing Review:
5 stars
Location of Work: Walnut Grove (Langley) – Date of Work: October 2022

I’m happy to say that I have found an outstanding roofer which I will use again without hesitation for any future roofing issues that may occur.
Darren McMartin arrived on a Wednesday to examine 4 skylights on my roof that were old and in need of replacement. He also noticed that my 5 attic roof vents were way too small and not up to current code and that a furnace roof vent was also previously installed incorrectly.
I received the estimate for the work that Wednesday night, which I approved Thursday morning and to my pleasant surprise, Darren booked my job for the next day (Friday).
Darren arrived early (yes early!) Friday morning and worked all most nonstop for 11 hours to complete all of the work in the one visit.
I found Darren to be extremely knowledgeable, hard working, neat and that all of his repairs and upgrades were completed to the highest of standards.
His attention to the smaller details such as roof, and drive way clean up, touching up all the flashing and PVC vent pipes with black paint so everything on the roof coloured matched, and the recycling of old materials and packaging made feel assured that the important work was also completed with the same attention to detail and quality. He also reassured me that my shingle roof was still in good shape and had at least another 10 years left (No up-selling).
As it turned out 3 of the 4 old skylights had started to leak and that 1 of them was so badly installed that Darren was surprised that water wasn’t pouring into my home or that a strong wind hadn’t blown it off of the roof.
I now have 4 brand-new high-quality skylights with a 10-year warranty that have been properly installed, as well as adequate roof venting. Darren’s’ 25 years of roofing experience is really evident as observed in the final inspection of his work.
Thanks to Darren and his exceptional, quality work, the weather term ‘atmospheric river’ doesn’t send shivers down my spine any more.
Darren, thank you for everything you did, it is greatly appreciated!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rick Grant","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJOmVIpO90wl-bxaW0v4Cz_ANzXaOZaFMI6DLTbYpyVDcJknw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Darren did roof cleaning to my house and detached garage recently. He came on time and worked diligently. It’s clear to me that he’s detailed oriented and very particular with his work. He took steps to clean up after the job and spray down any dirt that kicked up on the walls. I asked him to clear a few of my gutters and clean the exterior which he did. Prices are fair and the quality of the work is high. I would recommend Darren.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chantelle Van Dijk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJJgk--fzVoDGiG2GlCaRtsMiEtJLAckqnKVFvzR6nSV7jREQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We contacted McMartin Roofing for a skylight replacement after another company gave us the runaround. We needed the skylight replaced in the next few days. Darren was quick to come check out the existing skylight and provide a quote. What we thought was a standard size (as we were told by the other company), was actually slightly different and not quite as easy a fix as we were hoping. Darren provided us with a couple of different options at reasonable prices and was even able to accommodate the replacement the following day. We're extremely happy with the service we received and would highly recommend McMartin Roofing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Neely Morisset","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5SX84-7l2RyzhXGA29OXkYKc-Jtl_Ek124oaZN51kDZ6t7g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We just had our roof redone in Langley. Darren was wonderful to deal with from the first time he came out to look at the roof...to coming back after the bin was taken away to clean up and check for any nails that may have been left. Darren and his crew were really clean and super fast. He also installed 2 sun tunnels and the process was clean and smooth and the results are fabulous. Highly recommend McMartin Roofing for sure!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Theresa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLS9MnsrR6g6sWsafJMlIV6WhkCsAWtiXr99oS550ah8PDgXg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Darren and the team at McMartin Roofing just finished replacing our roof, gutters and downspouts.

My husband and I did our due diligence and had a few companies provide us with quotes on getting our roof done.  One quote was significantly more, one was significantly less and one was "give or take" the same.  We then spent time researching the materials each company offered and McMartin Roofing came out heads and shoulders above their competitors.

The works was completed on time and on budget.  I would highly recommend McMartin Roofing for your roof repairs/replacement.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gary Chinery","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKAqyrne6sbI5t-9ll9pkTeu8zXepPpDxJPxkgGNtwgHVBVgg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Many years ago we had our roof replaced by McMartin Roofing. Rick was happy to help and had his technician on site within a week and the issue was resolved in 20 mins. I previously gave 5 stars for the installation and equally this service call deserves 5 stars. Again, I highly recommend In Awe Roofing for both new installations and service calls.

Without any hesitation, we would highly recommend In-Awe for re-roofing or service call. We received a quote for a re-roof from Rick in June 2017, however subsequently requested the job be pushed to June 2018. Despite a an increase in the cost of the materials, Rick kept to the quote and provided a very competitive price which included the manufacturer's warranty in addition to his own. He took time to meet with us on more than once occasion to answer all our questions and ensure we felt comfortable before we committed. The work crew were pleasant, hardworking and despite the debris that results from replacing a cedar shake roof, keep our property clean on a daily basis. After the work was completed (on time), Rick dealt with any deficiencies we brought to his attention, which were minor, promptly and without hesitation. I'm very confident in the integrity of our new roof and after 25 years, it has refreshed the look of our home. I can honestly say Rick and his team are one of the best, if not the best, contractor's we have worked with in maintaining our home over this period of time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICk3qD2Cg&fid=0x0:0x7f1e062872486bac"],"When":"2019-6-15"},{"Name":"Jane Zhang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKdxc3S6Tzfg_qswqxamIk9apyDQ0JmC0UxkdLgJun3a1irTA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We have hired In Awe Roofing for two properties. Rick and his team did our first roof, gutter and fascia board in 2020 with great attention to details and we were very satisfied with the final result. So when we needed a roofer for a new property early 2025, we reached out to Rick again when he was out of town. While not sure if he could take on the project due to the short timeline we had, we also contacted another company. As soon as Rick was back home, Rick climbed up the roof and sent us detailed pictures that showed the conditions of the roof, despite the cold, windy weather. He then presented a thorough and reasonable quote. In contrast, another company also sent me their quote, but theirs was based on satellite pictures. In the end we were provided a competitive price for good, better and best roofing options.

The 21st Century Roofing team was amazing. They tarped our house and surrounding areas to protect it from roof debris. Every evening the entire job site was cleaned and a magnetic roller was used to insure no roofing nails were left on the ground. Job site safety was a priority. The entire team was professional and polite.

I would not hesitate to recommend 21st Century Roofers to any perspective clients needing a new roof and/or a repair.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bernadette Arcand","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXlqA87h9JI6g4BmVgyI78p_t7d_t5qK-7NNZi5KSUo7lKBdOyQQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After extensive research on roofing products and requesting several quotes from roofers in my area, we selected 21st Century Roofing, for a number of factors, which I will discuss in my review.

I was able to purchase the roofing product that I desired at a more reasonable rate than competition, and with Darryl's expertise, we were able to increase visual appeal on our home ridges, plus improve venting performance with ridge venting without a huge added cost; something we had not considered even through our research.

What is more, we had a very difficult time sourcing a skilled trade/carpenter/framer who could assist us with some non-structural roof modifications prior to the roof installation. This was delaying our ability to start the project.
Darryl had someone who was skilled, willing, and able to start the work at our home when we were ready! Within a matter days, modifications were done, roofers were on site for 3 days, Darryl took care of the debris with his pinkbins service, excellent custom flashing was like icing on a cake, and everything was done before I knew it.

The quality of the work is apparent. Darryl and I walked the roof for an overall inspection and it was an impressive sight. Overall I am incredibly grateful for Darryl's oversight and support on my home project, which moved the needle on a great deal of work that had to be done. There is nothing easy about needing a new roof, and one of the larger homeowner expenses, but having a trusting partnership with a roofing contractor, with all the work done with care, attention and quality top of mind, speaks volumes of 21st Century Roofing.

This made a huge difference in choosing the perfect look for my roof. We went with MaxDef Granite Gray.

The crew was outstanding. They were respectful, professional, and took great care both in the installation and in cleaning up the property afterwards. Everything was done with attention to detail, and it shows in the final result.

Mike was really good and explained everything I needed. Offered to consider a few options to make sure that I'm fully confident and satisfied.  The price was really good too. Everything happened as promised from early morning arrival to the moment when everything was completed. Mike came next day just to make sure that there was no nails or garbage missed. Great sign of respect and responsibility. Really appreciated. This company is solid. All guys are super friendly, professional and experienced. I'm hiring them for my new gutters. This company you can trust your business and any issues with your  roof. Highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIChh_f-wQE&fid=0x0:0x4aef9a794929fa4f"],"When":"2023-2-23"},{"Name":"Jack Nickel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXQjnQqhYbFQvkIWYDWSt3S6XOnhEN1rko4qClcyw2nuquXvGx-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My roof was 24 years old and I knew that the cladding on my two chimney chases was in bad shape. I contacted several roofing companies but Michael at Spartan was the only one willing to do the whole job. Before making a final decision I spoke with an individual who had his roof replaced by Michael. He told me he was very happy with the work and the only problem he had was chasing Michael down to pay him. This individual also mentioned that Spartan had replaced a roof across the street and that the work had originally been contracted to Penfolds but that they had subcontracted the work to Spartan. I had also been talking to Penfolds but their quote was roughly 50% higher than Spartan's for the roof portion alone. Spartan was clearly the best choice.

I decided to go with the Landmark PRO shingles and I am glad I did. They are a heavier shingle as evidenced by the difficulty in cutting them. I was impressed with the work ethic of the crew. It was difficult to get them to take a break even though it was quite hot.

The main chimney chase was clad in channel cedar and was roughly 25 feet high. The original builder had not flashed the top of the chimney and when Michael pulled the bottom siding off it was clear that the base structure was totally rotted and that all the plywood and siding on two sides had to be replaced. He dove right in, fortified the structure and replaced the plywood and siding and ensured that it had proper flashing so the problem would not happen again. All of this was done by ladder from sloped ground - truly amazing!

I am very happy with the quality of work done and I have no reservation in recommending Michael and Spartan to my friends and family. I feel lucky to have found him.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJqsjfPw&fid=0x0:0x4aef9a794929fa4f"],"When":"2023-6-24"}]

Our original cedar shake roof was 30 years old and we had a leak from the kitchen skylight. I did a lot of research on Homestars and made a list of a number of roofing companies, including Accountable Roofing Services Ltd. I was impressed by the high praise that Derek received from his satisfied customers. There was one review in particular that caught my eye where a senior had noticed Derek's crew working on a house down the street from his home. The senior had a minor repair that he needed done on his roof so he walked down to Derek's job site and told him about it. Derek accompanied the senior back to his home and did the repair right then and there while his crew continued working on the other house. If I recall correctly, the cost of the repair was $160. He was busy with a job, but he made the time to help out the senior in need. This told me a lot about his character.

For that reason, I called Derek first and asked him for a quotation on the cost of repair, if possible, and the cost of replacement with asphalt shingle. I also asked him to look at the 6 skylights and the kitchen skylight in particular since it was leaking. He provided us with quotations to replace the 6 skylights and to repair the cedar shake roof as well as a quotation for a totally new asphalt shingle roof, including 6 new skylights. What impressed me was his honesty in providing me with a repair quotation which was a fraction of the cost of a new roof. In the end, my wife and I opted for a new roof with GAF HD shingles and 6 new skylights.

The work on the new roof with GAF HD shingles including installation of 6 new skylights was started on August 5 and completed in 4 working days. Derek is a very detail oriented person and kept us informed throughout the process. He took many pictures and it was obvious from looking at them that he was meticulous in making sure that he did a perfect job. We have a lot of flowerbeds, small trees and bushes in our garden around our home and Derek made sure that everything was properly covered and protected. Derek was there every day not only supervising by doing some of the work himself. He was the last person to leave every day. After the crew did a once over on our lawn to pick up nails and debris, Derek went over it again in detailed fashion to make sure that everything was picked up. He and his crew always tidied all of their equipment and supplies at the end of each day so that our property was not left looking like a construction site.

I think that Derek's company Accountable Roofing Services Ltd. is the only one which comes with a 20 year leakproof warranty. I believe that other companies offer a 10 year warranty. GAF shingles also come with a warranty and Derek attends to registration of the warranty after completion of the job so that the customer does not have to worry about it.

As I said, I made a list of the roofing companies with high ratings on Homestars with the intention of calling them after speaking to Derek first. I did not follow through with this plan. After speaking with Derek, I did not need to contact the other companies. I felt completely comfortable dealing with Derek who is a completely honest and upstanding guy. With Derek, customers come first.

We are very happy with our new roof and skylights. He provided us with a lot of pictures and even took a short drone video of the new roof!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sheetal Mistry","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIS0enDRjM4pRUoX7-QeSW7DLFtVsAo6M1hZoDoqxcQk8qWXA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great service from Accountable Roofing!!!!!

Half the time, they don't show up for work and they constantly postpone the project finish date...really frustrating to work with them from our experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"The Voice冷眼看世界","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUm23Cp-J9YOPi7bz-B68NdgoxwzZb94jttK8ccyx83r2ogapSC=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Extremely Disappointed with Mack Kirk Roofing – Unjustified Charges for Minimal Service

On June 23rd, while Mack Kirk Roofing was conducting repairs at our strata in Richmond BC, we approached their on-site crew to briefly inspect mold issues in our bedroom and bathroom ceilings. The workers entered our unit and spent approximately five minutes looking at the affected areas. They suggested the mold might be due to roof leakage and mentioned they would need to conduct further checks and provide a report.

To our surprise, we received an invoice for nearly $500 shortly afterward. The invoice contained only a two-sentence note, with no formal report or detailed findings, and its content contradicted what the workers told us in person. It’s important to note that this quick inspection happened while their team was already on-site for other work — they did not make a special trip from their Langley office for our request.

We contacted their office to respectfully dispute the excessive charge. After waiting nearly two weeks, their response was dismissive, claiming the charge was a “favor” — without addressing any of our specific concerns.

We’re sharing this experience to warn others about what we believe is an unfair and misleading billing practice. If this can happen over a five-minute informal visit, we worry how many others might have faced similar situations over the years.

We strongly urge homeowners and property managers in the Greater Vancouver Area to exercise caution and consider other options before hiring Mack Kirk Roofing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhATIePShgFztAHOWxpKuKLf&fid=0x0:0x47e73e685c5653de"],"When":"2025-7-22"},{"Name":"Amy Bachmann","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVqIi2NsZjhd2tyH-XzoWmcVuTPrQvog_aGWGG_B4duAtUtcoZ5=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an excellent experience with Mack Kirk. [{"Name":"Raul Valverde","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSH0kWXRZzRcknFnY62mThEdSzSBOVkQ39MrRmJVeHxg4SXNpz=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I'm a bit conflicted writing this review. The final product is not exactly what we expected, and we are not as happy as we thought we would be with the investment we made. This is not entirely MCA's fault, but I think there are things they could do to avoid situations where customers are not satisfied with the final result.
In our case, I didn't communicate exactly what I wanted, and MCA didn't clearly communicate what the final product would look like. I received a hand sketch with the quote and, to avoid additional drawing costs, I agreed to move forward based on that.
On a positive note, the craftsmanship and quality of the work are top-notch. The work is very clean and well done. Steve was great to deal with and was very empathetic when we spoke with him about our concerns.
On the other hand, the customer service rep we dealt with was not very empathetic, and the response felt more like "there's nothing we can do." A bit more empathy from the company when a customer is not fully happy with the final product would go a long way.
My advice to future customers is simple: communicate clearly what you want and make sure they clearly understand it before moving forward.
Overall, the workmanship is very good, and their field workers are skilled and reliable, but based on our experience, I would recommend making sure expectations are very clearly aligned before moving forward.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tony kaest","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWvAIMJymo6KASIJ6eETZYf3d6wMOSskKx9ddrPfoomeWZmkfQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was the 3rd time I have gotten a project done by Mr Coverall as in the past all was done very well in a timely manner,good crew .

I had issues with our EPDM Hidden Gutter system. It was terrible. Rhamil said his team could remove this system and we could install a new standard gutter system. Great idea. No more rotting wood facia boards and failing rubber membrane.
Rhamil answered all problems with solutions. His team were very courteous, professional and turned up when they said they would, rain or shine. Their roofing removal and installation were exceptional, using roofers on their team adding to decades of experience.
Great West Enterprises are a great, professionally run, safety orientated, family run business.

I can’t say enough great things about Excel Roofing. From the very first interaction, their responsiveness has been outstanding. Anytime I send a text or email, I get a reply quickly — which is huge in this industry. Communication is everything, and Thedy is always available to answer questions, whether it’s from me or directly from my clients. That level of accessibility gives everyone peace of mind.

What really sets them apart is the care they take on-site. One of my clients specifically mentioned how impressed they were that the team took extra time to carefully cover their flower garden and lawn before starting the work. It’s those small but thoughtful details that show true professionalism and respect for someone’s home.

Beyond the quality workmanship, the team consistently brings a positive, upbeat attitude to every project. They show up on time, work efficiently, and maintain a clean and organized job site. It makes the entire process smooth and stress-free for my clients.

title: Homeguard Roofing & Renovations Inc
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Evelyn A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWDtoplaGjnvDndAj1BP098F6y6hV9AOxUivkToKMn9XjlPOUI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am a very satisfied customer.

My old roof was leaking badly in the winter before I spoke to Homeguard.

The owner Geoff, gave me a very comprehensive quote recommending extra vents and trim that were not on the old roof, to improve the air circulation and water seals, using a much better product to keep the house dry.

Geoff sent Jesse to cover the leaking roof temporarily until the days were dry enough to start work.

When the weather improved in January, Milton the foreman and the crew of Kevin and Gavin arrived to rip off the old roof completely and replaced everything including the fascia board, with a much better product. Finally Colby came to put on new gutters and downpipes all around to make the whole house look so much better.

I am very happy with Homeguard and the great workers who did such an excellent job. They were so friendly, professional and helpful all the time. I am happy now that I have a new roof that can I be confident in for many years.

The price was good and the finished product is excellent.

I highly recommend Homeguard to anyone who needs work done on their homes.

It turns out that our old pipe flashing was completely deteriorated leaving a big opening allowing water to get in which actually turned out to be on two pipes instead of one. He was able to remove the old flashing and install a new set of flashing and sealant on both vent pipes that was letting water in. Since he came by to make the fix, we haven't had any issues since even after some heavy rainstorms and we're thankful that he was able to come out to fix the issue and prevent any further water damage inside the house! [{"Name":"Debra J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVL9R4tHwmss1bpD0WAP-WD1hK3xZeNBh0XV0s3h4UB7wmPCr2g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"🎉I couldn't be happier with the decision to choose Landmark Roofing for our roof installation. David, the owner, was incredibly professional and knowledgeable throughout the entire process. Our roof was installed back in 2020, and it still looks as good as new today, which is a testament to the high-quality workmanship and materials used by Landmark Roofing. We were moving from a cedar wood shake roof to shingles and chose a dark brown that shows no wear to date.

✔ David and his team were prompt, efficient, and made sure everything was done to the highest standard. It was truly the best decision we could have made for our home. The fact that they are accredited by the BBB and recognized by Best of HomeStars further reassures us that we made the right choice.

☎ One of the standout aspects of Landmark Roofing is their ongoing commitment to customer satisfaction. Anytime we have had questions about our warranty or roof care, David has been quick to return our calls and emails, backing up his work and product with exceptional service. It's rare to find a company that not only delivers a great product but also stands by it long after the job is done.

👉 I highly recommend Landmark Roofing to anyone in need of roofing services. You won't be disappointed!

📌 I will have reviews for contractors/businesses we use for flooring, house painting, plumbing, gutters, doors and more in the Abby area. 📷 A picture speaks a thousand words.

📷 Arriving at Job, During Job, Finished Job, Condition Today.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICHlNu0Sg&fid=0x0:0x57fdfc5c0ebc7611"],"When":"2024-9-1"},{"Name":"Daniel Witt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtPiQBIDYV1Yq-DvDummr_OnD1AUiImZ9Zh9dBGvuIp9u5x63K-A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Although Davie Leite & his Landmark Roofing Co. came to our attention via a glowing referral from a close friend, we did vet 5 companies in choosing. Cheers","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICO2Ki3uAE&fid=0x0:0x57fdfc5c0ebc7611"],"When":"2022-5-31"},{"Name":"Roamer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX47qdkI7-aPOt5TRbhYzMGrs7QvBADAPVxpzVkJxQeBav5Dsaz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Landmark Roofing is great! We appreciate that he took the time to answer all of our questions - and I had many of them - & explain our roofing options. He also made sure to address any leaks we had prior to the new roof install. He is gracious, patient and most of all very knowledgeable. David made sure we had the right roof for our wants and needs. Onsite, Robert made sure that work was done properly & that the site was cleaned each night before leaving. He's a very good leader of his crew & did an amazing job. The crew was hardworking & diligent in their work. I highly recommend Landmark Roofing & are very happy we chose to go with them for our new roof. Thanks again boys!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Warren Wright","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLIniZ5bQ7W8Egy_5v-HUd5YU-KYOP81qEcWj7EV8vKfjfRiA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can't say enough about Dave and Landmark Roofing! We noticed a small leak in our roof on the Sunday of a long weekend and I called Landmark expecting to leave a message and have someone get back to me later. I was pleasantly surprised that Dave answered right away and made arrangements to come assess the problem as soon as possible. He came by with Rob and they found the problem very quickly and performed a small patch. I believe in supporting local companies and Landmark is a prime example of the excellent service available in our community. I highly recommended them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lance Nadeau","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKxwSyeNebwtV4YzciB_62ijXsLxMd9kQ76laxbCaWL5PJywg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I called Landmark and 2 other companies Wednesday David from Landmark was one of 2 companies to reply and the only company to supply a quote. David then arranged for a crew to put tarps on the roof to insure no more water damage that same day. He then confirmed on Sunday the crew would be able to start on Tuesday.

The crew was on time and professional the work site was kept clean as it progressed. The work was completed on time and as quoted.

I am impressed with the whole process and if you knew me I don’t get impressed easily. I highly recommend the team at Landmark.

Thanks
Lance and Mary Nadeau","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rob MacPherson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUcWI59ykqzy3YTAROT8sEfEg4GRRlglALHGEj_jFz0hJCR3YQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"David is really a great person to deal with as he came by to explain all my roofing needs to me and answered all the questions I had. I would highly recommend Landmark Roofing to anyone looking at getting their roof done.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kevin Carbonneau","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXllUFLYI0eyY8SgQcCIWYG7fnzL7emdVLl1LQs20W8dMHWA8k=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Over the course of three 12+ hour days, Landmark Roofing’s crew of Rob, Jake, Adam and Graham replaced my old cedar roof with Certainteed Landmark TL shingles; the built-in gutters and a skylight. I received a detailed written quote as well as addresses where I could view various roof colours, products and the Company’s  workmanship.  I appreciated David’s recommendations.  He reassured me that his crew is the best and I can wholeheartedly attest to their punctuality, politeness, work ethic and professionalism.  The  guys were friendly and didn’t hesitate at explaining what stage they were at or what was left to do.  They carefully protected the site for product delivery (the crane operator was really good too!)  and  the demo process and  cleaned up the property at the end of each day. Thank you David and Crew!   Shirley","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Justin King","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVVQfrVLmT1y3xRl8QeCK98b2NFzx675Jlg-mo-__suZL2jvX-A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A+ for Landmark Roofing!
